case_title: CAVALRY SPV I LLC VS. WILLIAM D. WALKER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM D.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: OSTERMAN, PETER R SUBSTITUTED FOR YALON, JEROME MICHAEL AS ATTORNEY FOR CAVALRY SPV I LLC
DECLARATION OF PLTF'S COUNSEL IN SUPP OF APPL OF CREDITS TO DEFTS ACCT AND WAIVER OF ATTY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: YALON, JEROME MICHAEL ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CAVALRY SPV I LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-23-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JUN-24-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSOCIATION OF COUNSEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM D. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC SERVED APR-08-2014, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE MAR-31-2014 AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM D.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM D. $1,974.02 PRINCIPAL, $245.00 COSTS, $400.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,819.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-23-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
